component.name: Papery
component.summary: Automatic wallpaper changer for COSMIC Desktop

description.p: Papery is a native wallpaper changer for the COSMIC desktop environment. It automatically rotates your desktop background using beautiful images from multiple online sources, running quietly in your system tray.

ul.li: Multiple wallpaper sources: Bing Photo of the Day, NASA Astronomy Picture of the Day, Wallhaven, Google Earth View, and local folders
Configurable rotation interval with hours/minutes/seconds precision
Light/dark theme filtering based on image brightness analysis
System tray integration with quick controls (next, pause, resume)
Background daemon mode — keeps rotating wallpapers after closing the window
Multiple scaling modes: Zoom, Fit, Stretch
Smart download caching to save bandwidth

description.p: Initial release with Bing, NASA APOD, Wallhaven, Earth View, and local folder sources.
